itemListElement.name: Private Limited Company Registration in Mumbai

mainEntity.name: How long does Private Limited Company registration take in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 5-7 working days from filing of SPICe+ form with MCA. Name reservation takes 1-2 days additionally. Total timeline from engagement to Certificate of Incorporation: 7-10 working days.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of Pvt Ltd registration in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our all-inclusive fee covers DSC, DIN, name reservation, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA drafting, and government fees. Contact us at +91-77000 89597 for a fixed-fee quote. No hidden charges.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to visit your Mumbai office for company registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The entire process is handled digitally — DSC procurement, MCA filing, and document delivery. However, our Goregaon West office is available for in-person consultations if you prefer.
